answer:
\boxed{C}

George Bizet's final opera was *Carmen*, which premiered in 1875 and remains his most famous work. *Les pêcheurs de perles* (1863) and *Don Rodrigue* (1867) were earlier in his career, while *Grisélidis* (1869) was a one-act opera based on a legend. Bizet died just months after *Carmen*'s debut, making it his last completed opera.
